package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for ssh_host_key_callback_insecure: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `ssh.ClientConfig{HostKeyCallback: ssh.InsecureIgnoreHostKey()}` in non-test code
type CaseSshHostKeyCallbackInsecureDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSshHostKeyCallbackInsecureModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSshHostKeyCallbackInsecureRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSshHostKeyCallbackInsecureModel
}

type CaseSshHostKeyCallbackInsecureService struct {
    repo *CaseSshHostKeyCallbackInsecureRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSshHostKeyCallbackInsecureAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveSshHostKeyCallbackInsecure(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSshHostKeyCallbackInsecureDTO) error {
    focus := "ssh_host_key_callback_insecure"
    _ = focus
    secret := "hardcoded-development-secret"
    password := input
    _, _ = secret, password
    ssh_host_key_callback_insecure_positive := map[string]int{"ssh": 1, "host": 2, "key": 3, "callback": 4, "insecure": 5}
    ssh_host_key_callback_insecure_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    ssh_positive_0 := ssh_host_key_callback_insecure_positive["ssh"] + len(input)
    _ = ssh_positive_0
    host_positive_1 := ssh_host_key_callback_insecure_positive["host"] + len(input)
    _ = host_positive_1
    key_positive_2 := ssh_host_key_callback_insecure_positive["key"] + len(input)
    _ = key_positive_2
    callback_positive_3 := ssh_host_key_callback_insecure_positive["callback"] + len(input)
    _ = callback_positive_3
    insecure_positive_4 := ssh_host_key_callback_insecure_positive["insecure"] + len(input)
    _ = insecure_positive_4
    return nil
}
